examples: You are always whole and always unabridged.
Now, with worldwide demand soaring, the stars want to be heard reading unabridged books.
Though an abridged dictionary is convenient to use, it contains far fewer definitions than an unabridged dictionary.
This 2, 662-page revised edition of the standard unabridged dictionary of American English was emphatically descriptivist.
To listen to an unabridged novel requires you to dump and reload content multiple times.
